children.heading: Requirement for submission
children.label: a Requirement for submission
children.text: As soon as practicable after , the coordinator designated pursuant to shall submit to the Congress a report on the overall assistance and economic cooperation strategy for the independent states of the former Soviet Union that is required to be developed pursuant to paragraph (1) of that section.October 24, 1992section 5812(a) of this title

the amount of the funds authorized to be appropriated for fiscal year 1993 by chapter 11 of part I of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 [ et seq.] proposed to be allocated for each of the categories of activities authorized by section 498 of that Act [] and to carry out (relating to American Business Centers), (relating to export promotion activities and capital projects), and subchapter III of this chapter (relating to the Democracy Corps);22 U.S.C. 229522 U.S.C. 2295section 5821 of this titlesection 5823 of this title

the amount of other funds made available for fiscal year 1993 to carry out the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 [ et seq.] proposed to be allocated for assistance under that Act for the independent states of the former Soviet Union; and22 U.S.C. 2151

the amount of funds available for fiscal year 1993 under the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 [ et seq.] that are proposed to be made to each agency to carry out activities for the independent states under that Act or this Act.22 U.S.C. 2151
